data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Extra security layer requiring more than one form of verification to log in to accounts.
data.technical_spec: Uses OTP, biometrics, or authentication apps.

data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Encryption protocol to ensure secure data transmission over the internet.
data.technical_spec: Implements TLS 1.2 and 1.3, certificates issued by trusted CAs.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine audits to identify and resolve potential vulnerabilities in the system.
data.technical_spec: Involves penetration testing and code reviews.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS)
data.description: Monitors network traffic for suspicious activities and potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Combination of host-based and network-based IDS solutions.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
data.description: Strategies and tools to prevent data breaches and unauthorized access to sensitive information.
data.technical_spec: Involves endpoint scanning and data encryption policies.
